  "description": "Geoplex Drillteq Limited - The fastest growing indigenous Service Company in Nigeria today was established in June 2002 to provide Oilfield Services to the upstream sector of the fast expanding Oil and Gas industry in Nigeria and the West Africa Coastal region. The Government policies aimed at encouraging and ensuring more participation by competent Nigerians in the upstream Oil &amp; Gas Industry has contributed to our growth process.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Payable Officer

Job Locations: Port Harcourt - Rivers &amp; Lagos

Requirements


	Candidates should possess an HND / B.Sc Degree (Minimum: Upper credit / second class upper).
	Must have 2-5 years of relevant experience.


What We Offer


	Competitive compensation and comprehensive health benefits.
	Structured training and continuous professional development across technical, non-technical, and business functions.
	Exposure to field operations and corporate support roles within the oil &amp; gas industry.
	Clear career progression pathways across technical, operational, and commercial tracks.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@geoplex.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Account Payable Officer Job at Geoplex Drillteq Limited




        
    

        
        Geoplex Drillteq Limited - The fastest growing indigenous Service Company in Nigeria today was established in June 2002 to provide Oilfield Services to the upstream sector of the fast expanding Oil and Gas industry in Nigeria and the West Africa Coastal region. The Government policies aimed at encouraging and ensuring more participation by competent Nigerians in the upstream Oil & Gas Industry has contributed to our growth process.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Payable Officer

Job Locations: Port Harcourt - Rivers & Lagos

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates should possess an HND / B.Sc Degree (Minimum: Upper credit / second class upper).
	Must have 2-5 years of relevant experience.


What We Offer


	Competitive compensation and comprehensive health benefits.
	Structured training and continuous professional development across technical, non-technical, and business functions.
	Exposure to field operations and corporate support roles within the oil & gas industry.
	Clear career progression pathways across technical, operational, and commercial tracks.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Risk and Audit Officer (Accountant)",
  "description": "Emeraldzone Business Support Services (EmeraldBSS), provides Business Advisory, Human Capital Interventions, Marketing Communication, Sales Capability Development and other broad Capacity Building Solutions among others, specific to each client&rsquo;s peculiar needs, to stand them out in their industry. We focus on Organization, People, Process and Technology to advance our outputs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Risk and Audit Officer (Accountant)

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary


	The Accountant (Risk &amp; Audit) manages financial records while integrating risk assessment and internal control functions into daily accounting operations.
	The role ensures financial accuracy, regulatory compliance, and proactive identification and mitigation of financial and operational risks.


Key Responsibilities
Accounting &amp; Financial Management:


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and reports.
	Manage general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, and reconciliations.
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
	Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes.
	Ensure compliance with accounting standards and tax regulations.
	Coordinate internal and external audits.


Risk Management &amp; Compliance:


	Identify, assess, and monitor financial and operational risks.
	Develop and implement internal control procedures to mitigate risk exposure.
	Conduct periodic risk assessments and control reviews.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and company policies.
	Monitor fraud risks, financial irregularities, and internal control weaknesses.
	Prepare risk reports and present findings to management.
	Support the implementation of enterprise risk management (ERM) frameworks.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to: hr@emeraldzone.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Risk and Audit Officer (Accountant) Job at Emeraldzone Business Support Services




        
    

        
        Emeraldzone Business Support Services (EmeraldBSS), provides Business Advisory, Human Capital Interventions, Marketing Communication, Sales Capability Development and other broad Capacity Building Solutions among others, specific to each client’s peculiar needs, to stand them out in their industry. We focus on Organization, People, Process and Technology to advance our outputs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Risk and Audit Officer (Accountant)

Job Location: Lagos

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Accountant (Risk & Audit) manages financial records while integrating risk assessment and internal control functions into daily accounting operations.
	The role ensures financial accuracy, regulatory compliance, and proactive identification and mitigation of financial and operational risks.


Key Responsibilities
Accounting & Financial Management:


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and reports.
	Manage general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, and reconciliations.
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
	Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning processes.
	Ensure compliance with accounting standards and tax regulations.
	Coordinate internal and external audits.


Risk Management & Compliance:


	Identify, assess, and monitor financial and operational risks.
	Develop and implement internal control procedures to mitigate risk exposure.
	Conduct periodic risk assessments and control reviews.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and company policies.
	Monitor fraud risks, financial irregularities, and internal control weaknesses.
	Prepare risk reports and present findings to management.
	Support the implementation of enterprise risk management (ERM) frameworks.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Financial Controller",
  "description": "Emeraldzone Business Support Services (EmeraldBSS), provides Business Advisory, Human Capital Interventions, Marketing Communication, Sales Capability Development and other broad Capacity Building Solutions among others, specific to each client&rsquo;s peculiar needs, to stand them out in their industry. We focus on Organization, People, Process and Technology to advance our outputs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Controller

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type:

Job Summary


	The Financial Controller is responsible for overseeing the organization&rsquo;s financial operations, ensuring accurate financial reporting, regulatory compliance, budgeting, internal controls, and effective financial management.
	The role supports strategic decision-making by providing financial insights and maintaining the financial health of the organization.


&nbsp;Responsibilities&nbsp;


	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements and reports.
	Monitor company cash flow, expenses, and financial performance.

Financial Controller Job at Emeraldzone Business Support Services




        
    

        
        Emeraldzone Business Support Services (EmeraldBSS), provides Business Advisory, Human Capital Interventions, Marketing Communication, Sales Capability Development and other broad Capacity Building Solutions among others, specific to each client’s peculiar needs, to stand them out in their industry. We focus on Organization, People, Process and Technology to advance our outputs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Financial Controller

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type:

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Financial Controller is responsible for overseeing the organization’s financial operations, ensuring accurate financial reporting, regulatory compliance, budgeting, internal controls, and effective financial management.
	The role supports strategic decision-making by providing financial insights and maintaining the financial health of the organization.


 Responsibilities 


	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements and reports.
	Monitor company cash flow, expenses, and financial performance.
	Ensure accurate and timely recording of financial transactions.
	Analyze financial data and provide recommendations to management.
	Develop and manage annual budgets and financial forecasts.
	Establish and maintain strong internal control systems.
	Provide financial advice to management on investments, cost reduction, and profitability.
	Support business growth strategies through financial analysis.
	Identify financial risks and recommend mitigation strategies.
	Supervise and mentor finance and accounting staff.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or related fields.
	4–5 years of experience in finance or accounting roles.
	A Master’s Degree or MBA is an added advantage.
	Professional certification such as Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN)
	Previous experience in a supervisory or managerial position is an advantage.
	Strong financial analysis and reporting skills.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	High level of integrity and attention to detail.
	Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
